rawQuestion: Hey, my HOD is on vacation and can't sign my NOC. Can the Training & Placement Officer (TPO) sign it instead?
answers: Peer: Yes, my TPO signed it and it got approved.
Admin: Yes, any authorized signatory at your college, including HOD, Acting HOD, Dean, Principal, or TPO, can sign the NOC.

rawQuestion: Do I have to print the NOC and sign it by hand or can I just use a digital signature on the PDF?
answers: Peer: I think physical sign is needed.
Admin: Digital signatures are not accepted on the PDF path. You must print the NOC, get it signed and stamped by hand, scan it, and upload the PDF.

rawQuestion: my exams are starting next week can i get a week off during the internship to prepare?
answers: Peer: No, they don't allow leave.
Admin: Leave is not permitted. The 55-day continuous window is a non-negotiable part of the internship. If you have exam conflicts, please defer to the next batch.

rawQuestion: How much stipend do we get for this? Is there any security deposit?
answers: Peer: No stipend bro, it is unpaid.
Admin: The VINS internship is completely free and has no stipend. We do not charge anything, and we do not pay any stipend for Bronze and Silver phases.

rawQuestion: Will I get a physical certificate shipped to my home address?
answers: Peer: I think it's digital.
Admin: No, completing the Bronze and Silver phases earns an e-certificate issued on samagama.in. Physical copies are not posted.

rawQuestion: I see a yellow VINS panel on my result page. Does this mean I am officially selected?
answers: Peer: Yes, yellow means selected, green is vise.
Admin: Yes, the yellow VINS panel on your dashboard indicates that you have been selected. You can proceed with the NOC process.

rawQuestion: Is it possible to change my project after starting Bronze phase?
answers: Peer: No way, projects are fixed.
Admin: No, project assignments cannot be changed once they are allocated at the end of the orientation and training phase.

rawQuestion: How many hours do we need to work daily? Can I do a part-time job alongside?
answers: Admin: VINS is a full-attention, full-time internship requiring 6 to 10 hours of work per day. You cannot hold a part-time job or other engagements concurrently.

rawQuestion: Can I submit my NOC after the internship starts? I'm waiting for college reopening.
answers: Admin: No. Your internship cannot formally start until your NOC is uploaded and validated. Please upload it as soon as possible.

rawQuestion: I uploaded my NOC 2 hours ago but it still says 'pending verification'. What should I do?
answers: Peer: Wait for a day.
Admin: Verification can take between one hour and one full working day. Please wait. There is no need to escalate unless it exceeds 24 hours.

rawQuestion: I'm doing a course on Coursera. Can I get an NOC from Coursera for this internship?
answers: Admin: No. The internship requires enrollment in a full-time degree program at a recognized college. Online courses or bootcamps do not satisfy this.

rawQuestion: What is Rosetta and is it compulsory to write in it daily?
answers: Peer: Yes it is compulsory.
Admin: Rosetta is your daily internship journal. You must update it every single day. It is a mandatory requirement for earning your certificate.

rawQuestion: Can I write my Rosetta journal using AI like ChatGPT to summarize my work?
answers: Peer: Don't do that, they have detectors.
Admin: No. AI-generated entries in Rosetta are strictly prohibited. The journal must reflect your own thinking. Using AI will lead to termination.

rawQuestion: What happens if I miss a live session in Phase 1?
answers: Peer: You lose points.
Admin: Attendance in live sessions is mandatory. Missing sessions without prior consent will impact your Spurti Points and may lead to removal.

rawQuestion: What are Spurti Points (SP) and what is the minimum we need to maintain?
answers: Admin: Spurti Points indicate engagement. You should maintain your points above the threshold communicated by your mentor to avoid review.

rawQuestion: Can I form a team with my friends from the same college?
answers: Peer: No, teams are randomized.
Admin: Teams are assigned by mentors based on project requirements. You cannot choose your own team members.

rawQuestion: My login for ViBe LMS is not working. It says user not found.
answers: Peer: Use the email where you got the selection mail.
Admin: Please register on ViBe LMS using the email address where you received your VINS selection result. If issues persist, raise #escalate in Yaksha chat.

rawQuestion: Does VINS offer internship extensions if we need more time to finish the project?
answers: Peer: 1 month grace is allowed.
Admin: You can take an optional 1-month grace period, but all VINS internships for this cycle must end on or before 31 December 2026.

rawQuestion: Can I talk to my mentor directly on WhatsApp?
answers: Peer: No, only Slack or Discord.
Admin: No. WhatsApp communication is prohibited. All official discussions must occur on the designated platform channels (Slack/Discord/Yaksha).

rawQuestion: If I get selected, do I get the offer letter on my email?
answers: Peer: No, download it from dashboard.
Admin: No. The offer letter is not emailed. It lives on your dashboard at samagama.in and will be downloadable once your NOC is validated.

rawQuestion: Is there any grade report along with the internship certificate?
answers: Peer: Yes, it shows your scores.
Admin: Yes, a grade report summarizing your project contributions and Rosetta performance is issued alongside the completion certificate.

rawQuestion: I forgot to upload the NOC and the deadline has passed. Can I still upload it?
answers: Peer: Yes, there is no calendar deadline, but your start will be delayed.
Admin: You can upload your NOC late, but your internship start date will be pushed back accordingly. Try to upload it as soon as possible.

rawQuestion: Can dual degree students get the NOC signed by their PG department instead of UG?
answers: Peer: Yes, either is fine.
Admin: Yes, dual degree students can get the NOC signed by either their UG or PG department, whichever is convenient.

rawQuestion: I want to take leave for 2 days for my sister's wedding next week. Is it possible?
answers: Peer: No leave allowed.
Admin: No. VINS has a strict continuous commitment policy. Leave is not permitted. If you cannot commit, you will need to join the next batch.

rawQuestion: What is the difference between Gold and Platinum badges?
answers: Peer: Gold is for features, Platinum is lab visit.
Admin: Gold badge is awarded for exceptional feature contributions during the project. Platinum is a standing invitation to visit the lab with a travel stipend.

rawQuestion: How do we get assigned to projects? Is it based on our resume?
answers: Peer: Based on your training scores.
Admin: Project allocation is done after evaluating your performance in the Phase 1 training (Bronze phase) and alignment with mentor needs.

rawQuestion: Hey, I need some help regarding Slack channel access. I didn't receive the invite link.
Does anyone know if we need a high-end laptop for the AIML projects?
answers: Peer: I think basic laptop is fine since we do training on cloud.
Admin: A standard laptop is sufficient as compute-heavy tasks will run on cloud resources provided by the lab.

rawQuestion: Is it possible to complete the internship in 1 month if we work double time?
answers: Peer: No, 2 months is minimum.
Admin: No. The VINS internship has a mandatory minimum duration of 2 months (55 days of active work). It cannot be condensed.

rawQuestion: I have an exam on June 15th. Can I submit my project a week early and leave?
answers: Peer: No, early exit is not allowed.
Admin: No. Early completion is not supported. You must complete the full 55-day window. If exams clash, you should defer your start date.

rawQuestion: proctoring strict
answers: Peer: yes
Peer 2: yeah

rawQuestion: Hey guys, can anyone tell me how to access the Yaksha AI assistant?
My teammate is doing literally nothing on the codebase for the past week. Can you please change my team?
answers: Peer: You should talk to your mentor.
Admin: Team allocations are final. If your teammate is inactive, report this to your mentor on official channels. Do not halt your own contributions.

rawQuestion: I started the cohort on May 20 but my college announced exams starting June 5. Can I shift to the July batch?
answers: Peer: You'll be relieved and deferred.
Admin: Yes, you will be relieved from the current batch immediately. You can re-initiate and join a future batch once your exams are over.

rawQuestion: Can I do the whole VINS coding and submissions from my phone? My laptop screen is cracked.
answers: Peer: No way, coding on phone is impossible.
Admin: No. A standard laptop/desktop is mandatory for project contributions. Submissions and coding tasks cannot be completed on a mobile device.

rawQuestion: I got a proctoring alert because my brother walked in during the quiz. Will I get suspended?
answers: Peer: TAs review it. If it was a mistake it's fine.
Admin: Multiple flags will block your attempt. For accidental flags, please contact your TA to review the recording and reset the status if genuine.

rawQuestion: What happens if we submit our Phase 1 task late? Do we lose Spurti Points?
answers: Peer: Yes, SP goes down for late submissions.
Admin: Submitting tasks after the deadline will result in a deduction of Spurti Points. Consistent late submissions will trigger removal review.

rawQuestion: Does VINS provide a Letter of Recommendation (LOR) for job search after completion?
answers: Peer: Yes, mentors write them.
Admin: Mentors may provide a Letter of Recommendation (LOR) at their discretion based on high performance in the Silver/Gold phases.

rawQuestion: Can I update Rosetta once in a week? I find it hard to write daily.
answers: Peer: No, daily update is checked by system.
Admin: Daily updates in Rosetta are mandatory. Weekly batches are not permitted. Failure to write daily will negatively impact your Spurti Points.

rawQuestion: My selection panel is showing selection-in-progress for 3 days. Am I rejected?
answers: Peer: Ask Yaksha.
Admin: No. Results are released in phases. If selection is in progress, please check back in 24 hours or raise #escalate in chat.

rawQuestion: My mentor has not responded to my queries on Slack for 48 hours. What should I do?
answers: Peer: Mentors are busy, check with TA.
Admin: If a mentor is unresponsive on Slack, contact the assigned TA or write #escalate in the Yaksha chat for assistance.

rawQuestion: Is the final demo presentation evaluated by IIT Ropar professors directly?
answers: Peer: Yes, Sudarshan Iyengar and other professors evaluate it.
Admin: Yes, final project presentations are evaluated by the Vicharanashala Lab coordinators and IIT Ropar faculty panels.
